notes: Rebuilds Spending Plan beta from a one-off finance wizard into a setup-and-assessment flow.
Adds a maintained income setup table with common income sources from the spreadsheet.
Keeps spending setup aligned to validated money-flow buckets and spreadsheet sections.
Adds an Assessment tab with safe weekly spend, weekly AP/transfer instructions, warnings, and emergency/debt/savings guidance.
Keeps five fixed account roles and removes the user-facing finance creation wizard from the Spending Plan beta tabs.
Repository downloads include only the latest Windows package.
release: v0.6.25 Spending Plan setup and assessment rebuild
release_name: Spending Plan setup and assessment rebuild
release_notes: Rebuilds Spending Plan beta as income setup, spending setup, cash-flow assessment, and AP/account-role guidance rather than a one-off finance wizard.
